mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT A.menu_id , A.fave_id , A.menu_nm , A.up_menu_id , B.router_nm , B.menu_nm_eng , B.router_path , B.view_path , B.menu_icon , A.menu_odr , B.param , A.comp_id , A.hr_id , A.new_yn FROM esg.tb_hr_menu_favorites A LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu B ON B.menu_id = A.menu_id WHERE A.comp_id = #{compId} AND A.hr_id = #{hrId} ORDER BY MENU_ODR;

SELECT 'F' || LPAD( COALESCE( CAST(substring(max(menu_id), 2) AS INTEGER) + 1 , 101 )::TEXT , 3, '0' ) as menu_id FROM esg.tb_hr_menu_favorites WHERE menu_id like 'F%' AND comp_id = #{compId} AND hr_id = #{hrId} AND CAST(substring(menu_id, 2) AS INTEGER) >= 100

SELECT 'F' || LPAD( COALESCE( CAST(substring(max(menu_id), 2) AS INTEGER) + 1 , 101 )::TEXT , 3, '0' ) as menu_id FROM esg.tb_hr_menu_favorites WHERE menu_id like 'F%' AND comp_id = #{compId} AND hr_id = #{hrId} AND CAST(substring(menu_id, 2) AS INTEGER) >= 100
SELECT comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map WHERE user_id = #{loginId} AND orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map where user_id = #{loginId} and orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
SELECT ghm.grp_id FROM esg.tb_group_hr_map ghm INNER JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hi ON ghm.hr_id = hi.hr_id INNER JOIN esg.tb_user_info ui ON ui.user_id = hi.user_id and hi.user_id=#{createdBy}

SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id , sm.menu_nm , sm.up_menu_id , sm.fave_id , a.router_nm , a.menu_nm_eng , a.router_path , a.view_path , a.menu_icon , sm.menu_odr , null AS sch_ah , null AS cmd , null AS del_ah , null AS exl_ah , null AS sav_ah from dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm left join esg.tb_sys_menu a on a.menu_id = sm.menu_id where sm.menu_id like 'F%' union all SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.fave_id, a.router_nm, a.menu_nm_eng, a.router_path, a.view_path, a.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr,
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, MAX(COALESCE(tc.del_ah, 'N')) AS del_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.exl_ah, 'N')) AS exl_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.sav_ah, 'N')) AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL AND (thr.del_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, NULL)) OR thr.exl_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sav_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sch_ah='N') THEN 'U'
WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'G'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
CASE WHEN thr.del_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.del_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS del_ah, CASE WHEN thr.exl_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.exl_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS exl_ah, CASE WHEN thr.sav_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.sav_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.comp_id = #{compId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
AND ca.grp_id in
#{id}
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'N') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, COALESCE(thr.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(thr.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(thr.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = #{role}
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_menu thr ON thr.comp_id = #{compId} AND thr.hr_id = (select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = #{createdBy}) AND sm.menu_id = thr.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.fave_id, a.router_nm, a.menu_nm_eng, a.router_path, a.view_path, a.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, thr.menu_id, thr.del_ah, thr.exl_ah, thr.sav_ah, thr.sch_ah, tc.del_ah, tc.exl_ah, tc.sav_ah ORDER BY sm.menu_odr ) as sq where (sq.cmd='U' OR sq.cmd='G') AND sq.sch_ah <>'N'
mapper.insert:
insert into esg.tb_hr_menu_favorites ( select a.menu_id , a.menu_nm , a.menu_odr , 'Y' as use_yn , #{compId} as comp_id , #{hrId} as hr_id , 'N' as new_yn from ( SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, sm.router_nm, sm.menu_nm_eng, sm.router_path, sm.view_path, sm.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, null AS sch_ah, null AS cmd, null AS del_ah, null AS exl_ah, null AS sav_ah from dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id where menu_id like 'F%' union all SELECT * FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, a.router_nm, a.menu_nm_eng, a.router_path, a.view_path, a.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr,
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, MAX(COALESCE(tc.del_ah, 'N')) AS del_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.exl_ah, 'N')) AS exl_ah, MAX(COALESCE(tc.sav_ah, 'N')) AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'Y') AS sch_ah, CASE WHEN thr.menu_id IS NOT NULL AND (thr.del_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, NULL)) OR thr.exl_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sav_ah IS DISTINCT FROM MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, NULL)) OR thr.sch_ah='N') THEN 'U'
WHEN count(ca.*) > 0 THEN 'G'
ELSE 'I' END AS cmd,
CASE WHEN thr.del_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.del_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.del_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS del_ah, CASE WHEN thr.exl_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.exl_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.exl_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS exl_ah, CASE WHEN thr.sav_ah IS NOT NULL THEN thr.sav_ah WHEN MAX(COALESCE(ca.sav_ah, 'N')) = 'Y' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm LEFT JOIN esg.tb_sys_menu a ON a.menu_id = sm.menu_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_group_menu ca ON ca.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND ca.comp_id = #{compId}
AND ca.param='W'
AND ca.param='A'
AND ca.grp_id in
#{id}
COALESCE(thr.sch_ah,'N') AS sch_ah, 'U' AS cmd, COALESCE(thr.del_ah, 'N') AS del_ah, COALESCE(thr.exl_ah, 'N') AS exl_ah, COALESCE(thr.sav_ah, 'N') AS sav_ah FROM dataset.tb_dataset_favorites sm
INNER JOIN esg.tb_comp_auth tc ON tc.menu_id = sm.menu_id AND tc.grp_cd = #{role}
AND tc.param='W'
AND tc.param='A'
LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_menu thr ON thr.comp_id = #{compId} AND thr.hr_id = (select hr_id from esg.tb_hr_info where user_id = #{createdBy}) AND sm.menu_id = thr.menu_id WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY sm.menu_id, sm.menu_nm, sm.up_menu_id, a.router_nm, a.menu_nm_eng, a.router_path, a.view_path, a.menu_icon, sm.menu_odr, thr.menu_id, thr.del_ah, thr.exl_ah, thr.sav_ah, thr.sch_ah, tc.del_ah, tc.exl_ah, tc.sav_ah ORDER BY sm.menu_odr ) as sq where (sq.cmd='U' OR sq.cmd='G') AND sq.sch_ah <>'N'
) as a
)
